raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies a contradiction in the artifact and offers two alternative rewrites to resolve it.",
    "R1.4": "Maps against at least one prior work (iterative self-refinement) and articulates the delta.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing citation (retrieval-augmented generation as a relevant baseline).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one claim (novelty of iterative LLM self-feedback to climate impact narrative generation) but does not mark confidence or missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the contradiction and rewrites rather than the original artifact.",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors (the contradiction) and fabrications (comparison to single-pass RAG when only single-pass generation is mentioned).",
    "RX.5": "Non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.1,
    "RX.4": 0.1,
    "RX.5": 0.2
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies a contradiction in the artifact and offers two alternative rewrites to resolve it.
rationale.R1.4: Maps against at least one prior work (iterative self-refinement) and articulates the delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing citation (retrieval-augmented generation as a relevant baseline).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (novelty of iterative LLM self-feedback to climate impact narrative generation) but does not mark confidence or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the contradiction and rewrites rather than the original artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (the contradiction) and fabrications (comparison to single-pass RAG when only single-pass generation is mentioned).
rationale.RX.5: Non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason.
